positive: A stylized, whimsical cosmic cat constellation map, designed as a repeating seamless pattern. The main subject is a group of abstracted celestial bodies and animal silhouettes (including felines, owls, and deep-sea creatures) linked by glowing nebula lines. The style is neo-art deco meets astronomical diagram, featuring clean, thick black outlines and vibrant jewel-toned color fills (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple, and gold leaf accents). The composition must be centered and highly structured, suitable for textile printing. Lighting should be dramatically contrasting, emphasizing glowing internal light sources against a deep void background. Minimalist, bold graphic design.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, cartoon, messy, noisy, graffiti, writing, bokeh, photorealistic, bad anatomy, extra limbs
